statement: White space is wasted space and should be filled with more content or controls.
why_it_spreads: Pressure to surface more above the fold and a perception that empty areas look unfinished or inefficient.
evidence_against: NN/g (src-nngroup): adequate spacing improves comprehension, scanning and perceived elegance; cramming reduces legibility.
Material Design and Apple HIG (src-material, src-apple-hig): spacing and layout density are deliberate tools for hierarchy and focus.
replacement_principle: Use white space deliberately to establish hierarchy, grouping and focus; balance density against the task rather than treating empty space as waste.
still_applies_when: Information-dense expert tools may legitimately favour higher density
Excessive whitespace that forces unnecessary scrolling or hides relationships is also a fault
